mapper.update: update sys_user set points = points + #{points} where id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select points from sys_user where id = #{userId}

select u.id, u.username, u.avatar_url, u.points, ifnull(s.continuous_days,0) as continuousDays from sys_user u left join interaction_user_study s on u.id = s.user_id where u.is_deleted = 0 order by u.points desc limit 30

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.avatar_url, SUM(sub.cnt) AS total FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM forum_post WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id UNION ALL SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM forum_comment WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ) sub ON u.id = sub.user_id WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.avatar_url ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT #{limit}
